title: What Is ESG Integration? #shorts
description:
#ESG is a term that’s become increasingly widespread over the past few years. But with the many different interpretations surrounding it, what does ESG integration mean? Sarah Munday, Barings’ Head of Sustainability and ESG, explains. 
 
Learn more: https://www.barings.com/guest/esg/esg-in-investing

#esg #esginvesting #investing #sustainability
